title: Funky API Document for Transfer Operator

endpoints.summary: Search Trial Play Info By Player

fields.name: playerId
fields.description: The unique ID of the player. At least 3 characters are required. **Cannot exceed 64 characters.**

fields.name: statementDate
fields.description:
Format: yyyy-MM-dd
Statement date for settlement which includes date part only.

fields.name: betTime
fields.description: yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss Default is PlaceBet time, if SearchTimeType is 1, then Settlement time.

fields.name: refNo
fields.description: The reference number of the bet which is always unique.

fields.name: status
fields.description:
R: Running
W: Won
L: Loss
C: Canceled
D: Draw
V: Voided

fields.name: gameCode
fields.description: Specify game code to identify game.

fields.name: gameName
fields.description: Will return the name in English if the no specified language translation for the game.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: User currency ***(if you want to use kcurrency please contact to FunkySupport)***.

fields.name: effectiveStake
fields.description:
Effective stake.
For some games, game result might be TIE and the stake won’t equal to effective stake.
In fishing games, player might play more than the initial stake.

fields.name: winloss
fields.description:
winLoss = winAmount - stake
PlayerA placed $10 to an bet option which odds was 1.95, and he wins then gets $19.5(winAmount), therefore his winloss was $19.5-$10=$9.5.
PlayerB placed $10 to an bet option which odds was 1.95, and he loss then gets $0 (winAmount), therefore the winloss of the bet is $0-$10=$-10

fields.name: isVoucherBet
fields.description: Whether the bet was placed using a voucher

fields.description:
Format: yyyy-MM-dd

For some games, game result might be TIE and the stake won’t equal to effective stake.
In fishing games, player might play more than the initial stake.

fields.description:
winLoss = winAmount - stake
PlayerA placed $10 to an bet option which odds was 1.95, and he wins then gets $19.5(winAmount), therefore his winloss was $19.5-$10=$9.5.
PlayerB placed $10 to an bet option which odds was 1.95, and he loss then gets $0 (winAmount), therefore the winloss of the bet is $0-$10=$-10

fields.name: playerId
fields.description: The unique ID of the player. At least 3 characters are required. **Cannot exceed 64 characters.**

fields.name: voucherId
fields.description: If player is using voucher, fill in the unique id of voucher.

fields.name: fixStake
fields.description: Fixed value of the voucher. If 0 or less is provided for certain types of vouchers, a minimum stake will be assigned by system. Please use GetVoucherStakes API to get supported stake values for the specified game and currency.

fields.name: gameCodes[]
fields.description: The list of game codes to identify games.

fields.name: eventId
fields.description: Please contact operation team to get your event id

fields.name: data[].playerId
fields.description: The unique ID of the player. At least 3 characters are required. **Cannot exceed 64 characters.**

fields.name: data[].voucherId
fields.description: If player is using voucher, fill in the unique id of voucher.

fields.name: data[].fixStake
fields.description: Fixed value of the voucher. If 0 or less is provided for certain types of vouchers, a minimum stake will be assigned by system. Please use GetVoucherStakes API to get supported stake values for the specified game and currency.

fields.name: data[].gameCodes[]
fields.description: The list of game codes to identify games.

fields.name: data[].eventId
fields.description: Please contact operation team to get your event id

fields.name: memberList[]
fields.description: List of playerId values to pre-register for the event.

fields.name: freezeAllMembers
fields.description: When true, sets all members under the event to Frozen while closing the event. Defaults to false.

fields.name: gameCodes[]
fields.description: The list of game codes to identify games.

fields.name: trialPlayTimes
fields.description: Number of granted Trial Play spins.

fields.name: joinOption
fields.description:
How players join the Trial Play event.
launch: LaunchGame with eventId, players will automatically claim on first successful launch until it reaches maxMemberCount
bind: Call BindTrialPlayMembers to pre-register players before they can claim on launch.

fields.name: stakeOption
fields.description:
How stake is set on CreateTrialPlayEvent.
Fixed: send currency and fixedStake.
Level: send stakeLevel (1, 2, or 3 only). Stake is resolved at claim from game and currency.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Required when stakeOption is Fixed. Event currency; claim currency on launch must match.

fields.name: fixedStake
fields.description: Required when stakeOption is Fixed. On claim, if the game does not support this exact stake, the nearest smaller supported stake is used.

fields.name: stakeLevel
fields.description: Required when stakeOption is Level. Tier 1, 2, or 3 only. Call GetSupportedTrialPlayLevels for resolved amounts per game and currency.

fields.name: playerId
fields.description: The unique ID of the player. At least 3 characters are required. **Cannot exceed 64 characters.**

fields.name: voucherId
fields.description: If player is using voucher, fill in the unique id of voucher.

fields.name: playerId
fields.description: The unique ID of the player. At least 3 characters are required. **Cannot exceed 64 characters.**

fields.name: currency
fields.description: User currency ***(if you want to use kcurrency please contact to FunkySupport)***.

fields.name: isTestAccount
fields.description: A flag indicates if the account is for testing or not.Default value set to false

fields.name: data.playerId
fields.description: The unique ID of the player. At least 3 characters are required. **Cannot exceed 64 characters.**

fields.name: data.currency
fields.description: User currency ***(if you want to use kcurrency please contact to FunkySupport)***.

fields.name: gameType
fields.description:
Types of games.
Default Value : 0 (all).

fields.name: gameCode
fields.description: Specify game code to identify game.

fields.name: gameName
fields.description: Will return the name in English if the no specified language translation for the game.

fields.name: marginAdjustable
fields.description: "Indicates whether the margin/RTP is fixed or not."

fields.name: isNewGame
fields.description: The game that operator has not integrated.

fields.name: demoGameAvailable
fields.description: If true, a demo version of the game is available.

fields.name: demoGameUrl
fields.description: If DemoGameAvailable is true, it will have demoGameUrl.

fields.name: supportTrialPlay
fields.description: If true, game supports Trial Play.

fields.name: gameCode
fields.description: Specify game code to identify game.

fields.name: refNo
fields.description: The reference number of the bet which is always unique.

fields.name: playerId
fields.description: The unique ID of the player. At least 3 characters are required. **Cannot exceed 64 characters.**

fields.name: lang
fields.description:
The language of the player.
Will return English if the specified language code is not supported or recognized.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: If null, all currency's bet list will be returned.

fields.name: startTime
fields.description:
yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss.sss
Bet time (Default is PlaceBet time, if SearchTimeType is 1, then Settlement time.)

fields.name: endTime
fields.description:
yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss.sss
Bet time (Default is PlaceBet time, if SearchTimeType is 1, then Settlement time.)

fields.name: page
fields.description:
Current page. 
Please note that the page parameter starts from 1. If page = 0 is provided, the system will treat it the same as page = 1 and return identical results.

fields.name: currentPage
fields.description:
Current page. 
Please note that the page parameter starts from 1. If page = 0 is provided, the system will treat it the same as page = 1 and return identical results.

fields.name: gameCodes[]
fields.description: One or more game codes to resolve supported stake levels for.

fields.name: currencies[]
fields.description: One or more currencies to resolve supported stake levels for (operator currency; mapped per fund provider rules).

fields.name: entries[].gameCode
fields.description: Specify game code to identify game.

fields.name: entries[].currency
fields.description: Required when stakeOption is Fixed. Event currency; claim currency on launch must match.

fields.name: entries[].levels[].level
fields.description: Required when stakeOption is Level. Tier 1, 2, or 3 only. Call GetSupportedTrialPlayLevels for resolved amounts per game and currency.

fields.name: entries[].levels[].fixedStake
fields.description: Required when stakeOption is Fixed. On claim, if the game does not support this exact stake, the nearest smaller supported stake is used.

fields.name: data.trialPlayTimes
fields.description: Number of granted Trial Play spins.

fields.name: data.joinOption
fields.description:
How players join the Trial Play event.
launch: LaunchGame with eventId, players will automatically claim on first successful launch until it reaches maxMemberCount
bind: Call BindTrialPlayMembers to pre-register players before they can claim on launch.

fields.name: data.stakeOption
fields.description:
How stake is set on CreateTrialPlayEvent.
Fixed: send currency and fixedStake.
Level: send stakeLevel (1, 2, or 3 only). Stake is resolved at claim from game and currency.

fields.name: data.currency
fields.description: Required when stakeOption is Fixed. Event currency; claim currency on launch must match.

fields.name: data.fixedStake
fields.description: Required when stakeOption is Fixed. On claim, if the game does not support this exact stake, the nearest smaller supported stake is used.

fields.name: data.stakeLevel
fields.description: Required when stakeOption is Level. Tier 1, 2, or 3 only. Call GetSupportedTrialPlayLevels for resolved amounts per game and currency.

fields.name: data.eventStatus
fields.description:
Trial Play event state.
Active: event is open for claims within its schedule.
Closed: event was closed via CloseTrialPlayEvent; new claims are rejected.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: User currency ***(if you want to use kcurrency please contact to FunkySupport)***.

fields.name: gameCode
fields.description: Specify game code to identify game.

fields.name: data.supportedStakes[]
fields.description: List of available voucher stake amounts supported for the specified game and currency.

fields.name: data[].voucherId
fields.description: The unique voucher Id in operator.

fields.name: data[].playerId
fields.description: The unique ID of the player. At least 3 characters are required. **Cannot exceed 64 characters.**

fields.name: data[].fixStake

fields.name: data[].gameCodes[]

fields.name: gameCode
fields.description: Specify game code to identify game.

fields.name: userName
fields.description: The name that player prefers to show in game.

fields.name: playerId
fields.description: The unique ID of the player. At least 3 characters are required. **Cannot exceed 64 characters.**

fields.name: currency
fields.description: User currency ***(if you want to use kcurrency please contact to FunkySupport)***.

fields.name: language
fields.description:
The language of the player.
Will return English if the specified language code is not supported or recognized.

fields.name: playerIp
fields.description:
Player’s IP at the moment.
This is for preventing players from betting through VPN.
***(Please enter the correct country’s IP for real players due to regional restrictions, API testing is not subject to this requirement)***

fields.name: sessionId
fields.description: User session from platform, the unique ID when the player launch game. Max length is 300 characters.

fields.name: redirectUrl
fields.description:
If your site need to redirect to a specified URL, the parameter redirectUrl is necessary for overwriting the original behavior of Home/Back button e.g. close window or go to the previous page.
Calling without this parameter will keep the original behavior.

fields.name: isTestAccount
fields.description: A flag indicates if the account is for testing or not.Default value set to false

fields.name: maxBet
fields.description: The maximum bet amount that player can place.

fields.name: data.gameUrl
fields.description: The destination for operator to redirect player to the game.

fields.name: data.token
fields.description: The token for player to enter the game.

fields.name: gameUrl
fields.description: The destination for operator to redirect player to the game.

fields.name: token
fields.description: The token for player to enter the game.
